sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48461" key="qermoku/amos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θερμο-κύᾰμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, a <sense id="n48461.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leguminous plant</tr_>, of a kind between the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θέρμος</foreign> and the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύαμος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
